understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to win all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by maneuvering selectable pieces onto every goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, as indicated by the engine reporting WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) in the specified direction by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) but blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at the exact target pixel coordinates; multiple pieces must all occupy goals at once to win a level, with a finite step budget per level.
